'''kosazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulcerable|ulcerable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulcerable|ulcerable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kosazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kosazhithi|kosazhithi]] || [[word:kosazhiji|kosazhiji]] || [[word:kosazhishi|kosazhishi]] || [[word:kosazhiki|kosazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kosazhuthuthu|kosazhuthuthu]] || [[word:kosazhujuju|kosazhujuju]] || [[word:kosazhushushu|kosazhushushu]] || [[word:kosazhukuku|kosazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kosazhuthu|kosazhuthu]] || [[word:kosazhuju|kosazhuju]] || [[word:kosazhushu|kosazhushu]] || [[word:kosazhuku|kosazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kosazhufthuf|kosazhufthuf]] || [[word:kosazhufjuf|kosazhufjuf]] || [[word:kosazhufshuf|kosazhufshuf]] || [[word:kosazhufkuf|kosazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kosazhethe|kosazhethe]] || [[word:kosazheje|kosazheje]] || [[word:kosazheshe|kosazheshe]] || [[word:kosazheke|kosazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kosazhothotho|kosazhothotho]] || [[word:kosazhojojo|kosazhojojo]] || [[word:kosazhoshosho|kosazhoshosho]] || [[word:kosazhokoko|kosazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kosazhotho|kosazhotho]] || [[word:kosazhojo|kosazhojo]] || [[word:kosazhosho|kosazhosho]] || [[word:kosazhoko|kosazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kosazhofthof|kosazhofthof]] || [[word:kosazhofjof|kosazhofjof]] || [[word:kosazhofshof|kosazhofshof]] || [[word:kosazhofkof|kosazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfthĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfjĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfshĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfkĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfthĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfjĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfshĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfkĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfthĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfjĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfshĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kosazhĂŻfkĂŻf|kosazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kosazhĂŠthĂŠ|kosazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kosazhĂŠjĂŠ|kosazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kosazhĂŠshĂŠ|kosazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kosazhĂŠkĂŠ|kosazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kosazhathatha|kosazhathatha]] || [[word:kosazhajaja|kosazhajaja]] || [[word:kosazhashasha|kosazhashasha]] || [[word:kosazhakaka|kosazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kosazhatha|kosazhatha]] || [[word:kosazhaja|kosazhaja]] || [[word:kosazhasha|kosazhasha]] || [[word:kosazhaka|kosazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kosazhafthaf|kosazhafthaf]] || [[word:kosazhafjaf|kosazhafjaf]] || [[word:kosazhafshaf|kosazhafshaf]] || [[word:kosazhafkaf|kosazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kosazhasha|kosazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kosazhshĂ«asha|kosazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kosazhroasha|kosazhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kosazhmuasha|kosazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kosazhyaasha|kosazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokosazhnkshĂ«asha|gokosazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokosazhnkroasha|gokosazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokosazhnkmuasha|gokosazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokosazhnkyaasha|gokosazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kosasazhasha|kosasazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kosasazhshĂ«asha|kosasazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kosasazhroasha|kosasazhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kosasazhmuasha|kosasazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kosasazhyaasha|kosasazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokosasazhnkshĂ«asha|gokosasazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokosasazhnkroasha|gokosasazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokosasazhnkmuasha|gokosasazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokosasazhnkyaasha|gokosasazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kesĂŠzhasha|kesĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kesĂŠzhshĂ«asha|kesĂŠzhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kesĂŠzhroasha|kesĂŠzhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kesĂŠzhmuasha|kesĂŠzhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kesĂŠzhyaasha|kesĂŠzhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokesĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha|gokesĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokesĂŠzhnkroasha|gokesĂŠzhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokesĂŠzhnkmuasha|gokesĂŠzhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokesĂŠzhnkyaasha|gokesĂŠzhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kosfazhasha|kosfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kosfazhshĂ«asha|kosfazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kosfazhroasha|kosfazhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kosfazhmuasha|kosfazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kosfazhyaasha|kosfazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokosfazhnkshĂ«asha|gokosfazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokosfazhnkroasha|gokosfazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokosfazhnkmuasha|gokosfazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokosfazhnkyaasha|gokosfazhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
